hero.subtitle: Experts in corporate, immigration, and real estate law for international investors and companies.

whycr.title: Why Costa Rica?
whycr.body_p1: 51,000 km² of nature, scenic beauty, warm and welcoming people.
whycr.body_p2: Our country serves as a bridge between the two Americas and is bathed by two oceans — two gifts that have made it home to more than 6% of the planet's biodiversity.
whycr.body_p3: Alongside these unmatched biological and geographical conditions, 5,000,000 Costa Ricans live their days beneath the peaceful skies of a country that abolished its army over 70 years ago, allowing those once-military funds to be redirected toward health and education.
whycr.body_p4: Perhaps the most socially and politically stable country in Latin America — with a world-class healthcare system, one of the highest democracy indexes on the planet, and a 99% literacy rate — Costa Rica is simply the perfect destination.
